figures.caption: Figure 1: StatePlane end-to-end architecture. The write path (Event Boundary Detector → Episodic Encoder → Write Gate) selectively encodes state. The read path (Intent Classifier → Goal-Conditioned Retriever→ State Reconstructor) composes bounded context. The Security & Governance Layer enforces access control, provenance, encryption, and audit logging.
Table 3: Comparison with existing agent memory systems.
